hash_semantics.response_id: canonical tool response identity; trace references must use this field
hash_semantics.response_id_source: records whether response_id was explicit, derived from request_id, or derived from payload core
hash_semantics.request_id: broker request identity; kept for audit and backwards review compatibility
hash_semantics.raw_source_hash: sha256 over exact source artifact bytes or app response payload hash bundle
hash_semantics.normalized_source_hash: sha256 over canonical normalized rows/facts consumed by the tool
hash_semantics.output_hash: sha256 over emitted response payload with output_hash fields blank before hashing
